name: Api-Gohan
description: API con descargas busquedas y más creada por Dvwilker

items.name: YouTube MP3
items.innerDesc:
🎵 Download audio from YouTube

Usage: ?url=YOUTUBE_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: YouTube MP4
items.innerDesc:
🎬 Download video from YouTube

Parameters:
• url - YouTube URL
• quality - 360, 720, 1080
• download=true - Direct download

items.name: TikTok Downloader
items.innerDesc:
📱 Download TikTok videos without watermark

Usage: ?url=TIKTOK_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: Facebook Downloader
items.innerDesc:
📘 Download videos from Facebook

Parameters:
• url - Facebook post URL (requerido)
• cookie - Facebook cookie (opcional)
• useragent - Custom user agent (opcional)
• download=true - Descarga directa

items.name: Lyrics Finder
items.desc: Search song lyrics by artist and title
items.innerDesc:
🎤 Busca la letra completa de canciones

Parámetros:
• artist - Nombre del artista
• song - Nombre de la canción
• q - Formato "Artista - Canción"

items.name: Gemini AI
items.innerDesc:
🧠 Chat with Google Gemini AI

Example: /ai/gemini?text=Hola

items.name: DvWilk AI
items.innerDesc:
🤖 Asistente virtual DvWilk AI

Usage: ?text=TU_PREGUNTA
Continue: &continue=true

items.name: BRAT Image
items.innerDesc:
🎨 Create BRAT style images

Parameters:
• text - Text to display (required)
• background - Hex color (optional)
• color - Text hex color (optional)

items.name: Blue Archive
items.innerDesc: 🎮 Get random Blue Archive character images

items.name: Yotsuba Uploader
items.innerDesc:
📤 Sube archivos a Yotsuba Uploaded

Método: POST
Formato: multipart/form-data
Parámetro: file
Límite: 100MB
